title: Dogfood process identity display
goal: Show useful process identity for running workflow agents in operator-visible surfaces.

phases.name: implementation
phases.title: Implementation
phases.goal: Implement process identity display for running agents.

jobs.name: process-identity
jobs.prompt: Implement the backlog item: show process identity for running agents when available. Use ccc @mm27 as the implementation agent. Load the pirfl skill from ~/.claude/skills/pirfl if no local copy is available. Work in this declared worktree lane only; other agents or the lead may be working elsewhere. Do not revert unrelated changes. Scope: surface PID/process group for external workers and a clear non-PID native identifier for native subagents in operator-visible workflow status/TUI/detail surfaces. Preserve existing style, add focused tests, and run the targeted test plus fast workflow tests if practical. Return a concise summary with files changed and test results.
